XFAIL Migration reuses the same request_id for vLLM, but the prefill worker's KV cache still holds the request due to delay_free_blocks in disaggregated mode. With chat completions API, prefix cache hits on chat template tokens cause an assertion error in vLLM's KV cache manager (save_new_computed_blocks expects no new computed blocks for existing requests).
